records.ety: [L. fidelitas: cf. F. fidlit. See Fealty.]

defs: Faithfulness; adherence to right; careful and exact observance of duty, or discharge of obligations.
Adherence to a person or party to which one is bound; loyalty.
quotes: Whose courageous fidelity was proof to all danger.
The best security for the fidelity of men is to make interest coincide with duty.
The principal thing required in a witness is fidelity.
